stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced record Q1 sales driven by Blackwell AI chip demand, exceeding expectations amid global AI infrastructure buildout. Economic implications include accelerated capex in data centers, boosting GDP growth but raising inflation concerns from energy demands. Market psychology: FOMO buying as AI narrative strengthens, reminiscent of dot-com boom. Historical parallel: 2023 AI rally post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like oil rush fueling industrial revolution; rocket fuel for AI economy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal overwhelming positive coverage on earnings beat ($40B revenue vs $38B exp), X sentiment 85% bullish (semantic search on 'NVDA earnings' shows hype), partnerships with hyperscalers.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Potential 10-20% upside on continued AI momentum over next quarter.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Limited, only if AI bubble pops; expect 5% pullback max.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation (high PE), supply chain delays, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, high X engagement (20+ viral posts), historical patterns support sustained rally.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q1 profit of $5.2B, beating estimates, with FSD v12 rollout accelerating. Implications: EV adoption boost, autonomy unlocks robotaxi revenue ($10T TAM). Psychology: Cult following amplifies gains. Parallel: 2020 battery day rally. Analogies: iPhone moment for cars; Uber for robots.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News highlights delivery beat, X keyword search '$TSLA OR Tesla earnings since:2026-04-03' shows 90% positive, min_faves high on bullish threads.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition from BYD, margin pressure, Elon tweets volatility.

stocks.justification: Earnings surprise + product catalysts, strong social momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple warned of iPhone sales slowdown in China due to Huawei competition and economic headwinds. Implications: Slower services growth, supply chain risks. Psychology: Fear of peak iPhone cycle. Parallel: 2019 China tariff hit. Analogies: Blockbuster vs Netflix in smartphones; Titanic hitting China iceberg.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news on sales miss, X sentiment 70% bearish (semantic search 'AAPL China sales'), volume spikes on downside.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for 5% rebound on AI features.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst, but Apple resilience tempers severity.

stocks.impact_theory: Boeing machinists strike ends after 6 weeks, production ramps up with 737 MAX orders. Implications: Supply chain normalization, backlog execution. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallel: 2019 post-737 crisis recovery. Analogies: Miner back from strike; plane finally off ground.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Deal announcement, X posts celebrate end of uncertainty, positive analyst upgrades.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Minimal, risk of new quality issues.

stocks.justification: Tangible resolution, but ongoing quality concerns.

stocks.impact_theory: Microsoft Azure AI revenue surges 60% YoY, partnership with NVDA deepens. Implications: Cloud/AI dominance. Psychology: Safe mega-cap play. Parallel: 2023 OpenAI tie-up. Analogies: Windows for AI era; castle in cloud wars.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Guidance raise, X hype on Copilot adoption.

stocks.justification: Consistent performer, symbiotic with NVDA news.
